## Distribution reality (SPCXx on Mantle)

- Next largest holders: 0.30%, 0.24%, 0.10%, 0.10%; combined external float remains under 1%

- Change since June 16, 2026 baseline (99.54%): **-0.34 pts in ~2 weeks**. Distribution is moving, but at this rate the <75% threshold is quarters away.

## Thresholds to watch (falsifiable)

- [ ] SPCXx holders > 500 (June 16 baseline: 24)
- [x] Top wallet declining (99.54% to 99.20%)
